items.t: Baltic Dry Index Falls to Over 2-Week Low
items.x: The Baltic dry index fell 2.9% to 2,671 on Monday, its lowest since July 2. The capesize index, which typically transport 150,000-ton cargoes, including iron ore and coal, dropped 5.1% to an over two-week low of 3,889...

items.t: Tanker Count on Both Sides of Hormuz Exceeds 700 as Strait Tensions Reignite
items.x: AXSMarine’s live fleet tracker recorded 728 tankers in the Arabian Gulf following the renewed escalation around the Strait of Hormuz. Crude tankers accounted for 179 vessels (24.6%) of the total tanker fleet present...

items.x: A prolonged closure of the Strait of Hormuz could send Brent crude to $150 a barrel, revive inflation and force major central banks to raise interest rates despite slowing economic growth, Capital Economics said in a...
